query_normalized: statistical properties of integer partitions into distinct prime summands mathematics
rationale: The paper focuses on the general combinatorial properties of "distinct partitions" and a specific metric called "$k$-measure," but it does not address the specific constraint of summands being "prime numbers" or the statistical properties arising from that restriction.
